title: ValoriaMC
description: A modpack centered around create, with a few game extending mods like Ad astra and farmers delight. (required to join the Valoria Server)
body:
![A banner of the modpacks logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7301dca4a9c827ef3495f60f3d1254f22a3084b9.png) # Valoria: Modpack This modpack started as a small private project, but after great succes I decided everyone should be able to enjoy it. The modpack is mostly Create Based, with around 30 create based mods and a few world extending mods like Ad Astra and Farmer's Delight with it's addon's. A perfect modpack to Creatify your Minecraft ## Features - Around 30 Create Addon mods (with fan favorites like:) - Steam 'n' Rails - Clockwork - Big Cannons - the ability to go to Space! (Ad Astra) - A nice taste for the perfect cook! (Farmer's Delight) - Perfect Picture's (Exposure) - Realistic physics (Valkyrien Skies) - Proximity chat (Simple Voice Chat) - And ofcourse, the unforgettable JEI - (and performance enhancers for the potato pc's out there) ### Support For an error with the modpack within the app: [Modrinth Discord](https://discord.com/invite/EUHuJHt) For an error with the modpack itself:
Modlist
- Ad Astra - Botarium - Canary - Create - Clockwork - Big Cannons - Cafe - Central Kitchen - Confectionery - Crafts & additions - Deco - Deco Additions - Encased - Enchantment Industry - Jetpack - Ore Excavation - Slice & Dice - Stuff & Additions - Bells & Whistles - Bitterballen - Broken Bad - Connected - Copycats+ - Design n' Decor - Dreams & Desires - Estrogen - Extended Cogwheels - Interiors - Misc and Things - Numismatics - Steam 'n' Rails - TabFix - Train Perspective Fix - Trimmed - Crushed Astra - Farmer's Delight - End's Delight - Nether's Delight - Ocean's Delight - Curios API - Do a Barrel Roll - Exposure - FerriteCore - Just Enough Items - Just Enough Resources - Kotlin for Forge - Memory Leak Fix - ModernFix - Mouse Tweaks - Not Enough Animations - Resourceful Config - Resourceful Lib - Simple Voice Chat - Valkyrien Skies
